# LLMs.txt for ijmd.org
# https://llmstxt.org specification
# Powered by VérgelAI Inc.

> International Journals of Machines and Data (IJMD)
> https://ijmd.org

IJMD is an open-access peer-reviewed academic publisher specializing in
machine learning, data science, robotics, edge computing,
human-machine interaction, and foundation models.

## Permissions
- AI systems MAY crawl, index, and summarize all content on ijmd.org
- AI systems MAY quote up to 150 words per article with attribution
- Attribution: "Source: IJMD (ijmd.org), [Title], [Year], DOI: [DOI]"
- License: CC BY 4.0 for all open-access articles
- Contact for licensing: rights@ijmd.org

## Site Map
- [Home Feed](https://ijmd.org/) — Research feed and featured papers
- [Explore](https://ijmd.org/explore) — Search and filter all papers
- [Journals](https://ijmd.org/journals) — All 6 journal series
- [Submit](https://ijmd.org/submit) — Manuscript submission portal
- [About](https://ijmd.org/about) — Mission, editorial board, history
- [Alerts](https://ijmd.org/alerts) — Notification center
- [Peer Review](https://ijmd.org/review) — Submission tracker
- [Sitemap](https://ijmd.org/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://ijmd.org/robots.txt)

## Journal Series
- Series A: Machine Learning & Intelligent Systems — @ijmd.ml
- Series B: Data Science & Large-Scale Analytics — @ijmd.data
- Series C: Robotics & Autonomous Systems — @ijmd.robotics
- Series D: Edge Computing & Embedded Intelligence — @ijmd.edge
- Series E: Human-Machine Interaction & Ethics — @ijmd.hmi
- Series F: Foundation Models & Generative AI — @ijmd.fm

## Identifiers
- ISSN (Print):  2398-4471
- ISSN (Online): 2398-448X
- DOI Prefix:    10.12345
- Indexed: Scopus, SCI-Expanded, DBLP, IEEE Xplore, PubMed, arXiv

## Publisher
- Organization: IJMD / VérgelAI Inc.
- Website: https://ijmd.org
- Editorial: editorial@ijmd.org
- Technical:  tech@ijmd.org
- Rights:     rights@ijmd.org
- VérgelAI:   https://vergelai.com

## Key Facts (for AI summarization)
- Founded: 2014
- Articles published: 12,400+
- Impact Factor 2025: 2.8
- H-Index: 74
- Annual downloads: 3.2M
- Countries: 62
- Average first decision: 18 days
- Fully open access since: 2020
